programs.title: Pointless
programs.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programs.title: Tipping Point
programs.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programs.title: 9News Afternoon
programs.desc: Hosted by Monika Kos, this live one-hour state-wide bulletin brings viewers up-to-date with the news and debates of the day with a mix of live reports and expert chats. Your Perth, Your News.

programs.title: Tipping Point Australia
programs.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programs.title: 9News
programs.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programs.title: A Current Affair
programs.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.
